title: February 2, 2015 – Lakota John and Kin
summary: Of Lumbee and Oglala heritage, Lakota John and Kin is a family band from Pembroke, North Carolina. Debuting with the self-titled album Lakota John and Kin , their music brings Native American harmonies to familiar blues tunes. Featuring Lakota John, a 17-year-old slide blues guitar player, his siste...
